name: Kachousen
description: (Hold the button to change effect) (Effect changes when a Flame is stocked)A technique that sends forth a spinning fan. Hold down the button to change its properties. Useful for attacking opponents at range.

name: Midare Kachousen
description: (After a held Overdrive Kachousen) (Effect changes when a Flame is stocked)Throw two more fans after Overdrive Kachousen. The trajectory of these fans will change once they hit the opponent.

name: Ryuuenbu
description: (Effect changes when a Flame is stocked)Spin once before sending forth a fiery blaze. Easy to use as part of a combo when canceling from a normal attack, or to control space.

name: Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi
description: Cartwheel forward before jumping and striking with a vicious elbow. Easy to use as part of a combo when canceling from a normal attack.

name: Hishou Ryuuenjin
description: (Effect changes when a Flame is stocked)A rising, flipping knee strike followed by a flaming kick. Useful for countering an opponent's jumping attacks, or as part of a combo.

name: Musasabi no Mai
description: (During a forward jump) (Effect changes when a Flame is stocked)While airborne, diagonally descend with a powerful tackle. Useful for making surprise attacks or as a way to counterattack someone after dodging a projectile.

name: Kagerou no Mai
description: (Effect changes when a Flame is stocked)Set the immediate vicinity ablaze. Effective as an anti-air against jumping attacks or as part of a combo. Once performed, it adds five Flame stocks that boost the power of Mai's special moves and Super Arts.

name: Chou Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi
description: (Effect changes when a Flame is stocked)Rush forward in a ball of fire with a devastating elbow strike. A versatile move that can get around projectiles, be used in combos, and serve as a potent counterattack.

name: Air Chou Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi
description: (During a neutral or forward jump) (Effect changes when a Flame is stocked)Chou Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi performed while airborne. Easy to use as part of a combo from special moves.

name: Shiranui Ryuu: Enbu Ada Zakura
description: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)Lift the opponent into the air and blitz them with a series of elegant but stinging attacks. Effective as a close-range reversal, or as a damaging move in combos.

name: Senkotsu Uchi
description: An overhead attack that cannot be blocked while crouching.

name: Hien Ren Kyaku
description: Pepper opponents with a series of quick kicks. After the attack Mai will jump into the air, where you can cancel into an aerial special move.

name: Hoshi Kujaku
description: A multi-hit attack with a lenient input window for follow-ups.

name: Shiranui Gourin
description: (When near opponent)Grab the opponent's head, then flip over before tossing them away. Throws your opponent without switching places with them.

name: Fuusha Kuzushi
description: (When near opponent)Trap your opponent's head between your legs, then flip and slam them into the ground. Throws your opponent while switching places with them.

name: Yume Zakura
description: (During a jump) (When near opponent)Jump on top of an opponent in the air, and slam them into the ground. Throws your opponent without switching places with them.

name: Drive Impact: Botan Ichige
description: Lunge forward with a powerful attack. Can be used to absorb an opponent's attack while launching your own offensive.

name: Drive Reversal: Yusura Ume
description: (When blocking, recovering from a knockdown, or during a successful Drive Parry)Can be used after blocking an attack to quickly turn a defensive position into an offensive one. Can also be used when recovering from a knockdown. The input can be held while downed to perform this when rising.

name: Drive Parry
description: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)Adopt a stance that allows you to deflect all opponent strikes. This stance can be sustained by holding down the command used to activate it.

name: Parry Drive Rush
description: Immediately move forward from a Drive Parry stance. Normal or unique attacks performed while moving will have their properties changed.

name: Cancel Drive Rush
description: Immediately move forward out of an attack. Can be performed during any special-cancelable move.
